dashboard.label: DropWatch - Observability Overview
dashboard.description: Single-screen health summary for ZeroDrop flash drops, designed to read like a general service-observability board: golden-signal KPIs, throughput, error rate, latency, and a per-drop scorecard. Backed by index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry. Pairs with the operational DropWatch dashboard.

search.query: index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry | stats count latest(dropName) as dropName by dropId | eval label=coalesce(dropName,dropId) | sort - count
index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry $drop$ event!=sim_summary | timechart span=1m count | stats avg(count) as rpm | eval rpm=round(rpm,1)

panel.title: Error rate - reject share of attempts

search.query: index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry $drop$ (event=claim OR event=oversell_reject) | stats count(eval(event="oversell_reject")) as rejects count as attempts | eval err=round(rejects/attempts*100,1) | fields err
index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry $drop$ event=claim | timechart span=1m count as cpm | stats max(cpm) as peak
index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry $drop$ latencyMs=* | stats perc95(latencyMs) as p95 | eval p95=round(p95,0)
index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry $drop$ event=sim_summary | stats sum('meta.oversold') as oversold | eval oversold=coalesce(oversold,0)
index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry $drop$ event!=sim_summary | timechart span=1m count as events_per_min

index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry $drop$ (event=claim OR event=oversell_reject) | timechart span=1m count(eval(event="oversell_reject")) as rejects count as attempts | eval error_rate=round(rejects/attempts*100,1) | fields _time error_rate

index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry $drop$ event!=sim_summary | stats count(eval(event="claim")) as claims count(eval(event="oversell_reject")) as rejects count(eval(event="checkout")) as checkouts count(eval(event="waitlist_add")) as waitlist count(eval(event="hold_expiry")) as expiries dc(ip) as uniq_ips latest(dropName) as drop by dropId | eval reject_rate=round(rejects/(claims+rejects)*100,1)."%" | eval conversion=round(checkouts/claims*100,1)."%" | eval status=case(rejects>=50,"WATCH", rejects>=10,"ELEVATED", true(),"healthy") | table drop claims rejects reject_rate checkouts conversion waitlist expiries uniq_ips status | sort - claims
index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry $drop$ event!=sim_summary | stats count by event | sort - count

index=zerodrop sourcetype=zerodrop:telemetry $drop$ event=oversell_reject | eval subnet=replace(ip,"(\d+\.\d+\.\d+)\.\d+","\1.0/24") | stats count as rejects dc(ip) as hosts values(dropId) as dropId by subnet | where rejects>=8 | eval signal=if(rejects>=20 AND hosts<=12,"bot-cluster","reject-spike") | eval recommendation=if(signal="bot-cluster","rate-limit / challenge subnet","monitor") | table subnet dropId rejects hosts signal recommendation | sort - rejects
